calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Anthony James Bacan, Esq., for Petitioner: Maxine Mitchell, present as Guardian at litem for: Steven Mitchell, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,539.12
Costs $843.52
A net balance of $4,617.36 to be deposited into a blocked account with Union Bank, 3801 3rd Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim
and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
